## What This PR Changes

Module or lab affected: 

Type of change:
- [ ] Fixes a factual error (include guide_en.MD line reference)
- [ ] Adds exercises or quiz questions
- [ ] Adds or improves a tricky-details entry
- [ ] New module or lab content
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Infrastructure / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the 6-file module anatomy OR 5-file lab anatomy template
- [ ] Quiz questions use scenario-MCQ format with answer rationale in `<details>` blocks
- [ ] Answer keys are complete
- [ ] Factual claims reference guide_en.MD line numbers where applicable
- [ ] **No verbatim exam question text reproduced** (NDA violation — will be closed)
- [ ] Attribution to original author preserved where relevant
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly (tables, details blocks, code blocks)
